info.name: Board Enthusiasts API
info.description: Public Board Enthusiasts API documentation for public catalog access plus supported authenticated player and developer workflows.

item.name: Catalog
item.description: Public browse routes for games, apps, studios, and supporting catalog metadata.

request.description: Returns the supported genre definitions used for public catalog filtering.

response.name: success
response.body: {"genres":[{"slug":"cooperative-puzzle","displayName":"Cooperative Puzzle"},{"slug":"adventure","displayName":"Adventure"},{"slug":"strategy","displayName":"Strategy"}]}

request.description: Returns the supported age-rating systems used by the public catalog.

response.name: success
response.body: {"ageRatingAuthorities":[{"code":"ESRB","displayName":"Entertainment Software Rating Board"},{"code":"PEGI","displayName":"Pan European Game Information"}]}

request.description: Lists publicly visible games and apps in the Board Enthusiasts catalog.

response.name: success
response.body: {"titles":[{"id":"11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111","studioId":"aaaa1111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111","studioSlug":"blue-harbor-games","slug":"lantern-drift","contentKind":"game","lifecycleStatus":"published","visibility":"listed","isReported":false,"currentMetadataRevision":3,"displayName":"Lantern Drift","shortDescription":"A lantern-lit co-op puzzle game.","genreDisplay":"Cooperative Puzzle","minPlayers":1,"maxPlayers":4,"playerCountDisplay":"1-4 players","ageRatingAuthority":"ESRB","ageRatingValue":"E10+","minAgeYears":10,"ageDisplay":"ESRB E10+","cardImageUrl":"https://assets.example/catalog/lantern-drift-card.png","acquisitionUrl":"https://store.example/lantern-drift"}],"paging":{"pageNumber":1,"pageSize":20,"totalCount":1,"totalPages":1}}

request.description: Returns the public details for a single catalog title.

response.name: success
response.body: {"title":{"id":"11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111","studioId":"aaaa1111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111","studioSlug":"blue-harbor-games","slug":"lantern-drift","contentKind":"game","lifecycleStatus":"published","visibility":"listed","isReported":false,"currentMetadataRevision":3,"displayName":"Lantern Drift","shortDescription":"A lantern-lit co-op puzzle game.","genreDisplay":"Cooperative Puzzle","minPlayers":1,"maxPlayers":4,"playerCountDisplay":"1-4 players","ageRatingAuthority":"ESRB","ageRatingValue":"E10+","minAgeYears":10,"ageDisplay":"ESRB E10+","cardImageUrl":"https://assets.example/catalog/lantern-drift-card.png","acquisitionUrl":"https://store.example/lantern-drift","description":"Work together to route light and solve shifting puzzle rooms.","mediaAssets":[{"id":"8a2f9c4e-74bc-4ab8-9050-0fb550c7b8e1","mediaRole":"card","sourceUrl":"https://assets.example/catalog/lantern-drift-card.png","altText":"Lantern Drift key art","mimeType":"image/png","width":1280,"height":720,"createdAt":"2026-03-08T00:00:00.000Z","updatedAt":"2026-03-08T00:00:00.000Z"}],"currentRelease":{"id":"66666666-6666-6666-6666-666666666666","version":"1.2.0","publishedAt":"2026-03-08T00:00:00.000Z"},"acquisition":{"url":"https://store.example/lantern-drift"},"currentReleaseId":"66666666-6666-6666-6666-666666666666","createdAt":"2026-03-08T00:00:00.000Z","updatedAt":"2026-03-08T00:00:00.000Z"}}

request.description: Lists studios with public profiles in the Board Enthusiasts catalog.

response.name: success
response.body: {"studios":[{"id":"aaaa1111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111","slug":"blue-harbor-games","displayName":"Blue Harbor Games","description":"Independent Board studio building thoughtful co-op and family-friendly releases.","avatarUrl":"https://assets.example/studios/blue-harbor-games-avatar.png","logoUrl":"https://assets.example/studios/blue-harbor-games-logo.png","bannerUrl":"https://assets.example/studios/blue-harbor-games-banner.png","createdAt":"2026-03-08T00:00:00.000Z","updatedAt":"2026-03-08T00:00:00.000Z","links":[{"id":"bbbb2222-2222-2222-2222-222222222222","label":"Store","url":"https://store.example/blue-harbor-games","createdAt":"2026-03-08T00:00:00.000Z","updatedAt":"2026-03-08T00:00:00.000Z"}]}]}

request.description: Returns the public profile for a single studio.

response.name: success
response.body: {"studio":{"id":"aaaa1111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111","slug":"blue-harbor-games","displayName":"Blue Harbor Games","description":"Independent Board studio building thoughtful co-op and family-friendly releases.","avatarUrl":"https://assets.example/studios/blue-harbor-games-avatar.png","logoUrl":"https://assets.example/studios/blue-harbor-games-logo.png","bannerUrl":"https://assets.example/studios/blue-harbor-games-banner.png","createdAt":"2026-03-08T00:00:00.000Z","updatedAt":"2026-03-08T00:00:00.000Z","links":[{"id":"bbbb2222-2222-2222-2222-222222222222","label":"Store","url":"https://store.example/blue-harbor-games","createdAt":"2026-03-08T00:00:00.000Z","updatedAt":"2026-03-08T00:00:00.000Z"}]}}

item.name: Player
item.description: Authenticated player routes for reading and managing library and wishlist state.

request.description: Lists the authenticated player's current library titles.

response.name: success
response.body: {"titles":[{"id":"11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111","studioId":"aaaa1111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111","studioSlug":"blue-harbor-games","slug":"lantern-drift","contentKind":"game","lifecycleStatus":"published","visibility":"listed","isReported":false,"currentMetadataRevision":3,"displayName":"Lantern Drift","shortDescription":"A lantern-lit co-op puzzle game.","genreDisplay":"Cooperative Puzzle","minPlayers":1,"maxPlayers":4,"playerCountDisplay":"1-4 players","ageRatingAuthority":"ESRB","ageRatingValue":"E10+","minAgeYears":10,"ageDisplay":"ESRB E10+","cardImageUrl":"https://assets.example/catalog/lantern-drift-card.png","acquisitionUrl":"https://store.example/lantern-drift"}]}

item.name: Add a title to the player library

request.description: Adds a title to the authenticated player's library.

response.name: success
response.body: {"titleId":"{{titleId}}","included":true,"alreadyInRequestedState":false}

item.name: Remove a title from the player library

request.description: Removes a title from the authenticated player's library.

response.name: success
response.body: {"titleId":"{{titleId}}","included":false,"alreadyInRequestedState":false}

request.description: Lists the authenticated player's wishlist titles.

response.name: success
response.body: {"titles":[{"id":"11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111","studioId":"aaaa1111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111","studioSlug":"blue-harbor-games","slug":"lantern-drift","contentKind":"game","lifecycleStatus":"published","visibility":"listed","isReported":false,"currentMetadataRevision":3,"displayName":"Lantern Drift","shortDescription":"A lantern-lit co-op puzzle game.","genreDisplay":"Cooperative Puzzle","minPlayers":1,"maxPlayers":4,"playerCountDisplay":"1-4 players","ageRatingAuthority":"ESRB","ageRatingValue":"E10+","minAgeYears":10,"ageDisplay":"ESRB E10+","cardImageUrl":"https://assets.example/catalog/lantern-drift-card.png","acquisitionUrl":"https://store.example/lantern-drift"}]}

item.name: Add a title to the player wishlist

request.description: Adds a title to the authenticated player's wishlist.

response.name: success
response.body: {"titleId":"{{titleId}}","included":true,"alreadyInRequestedState":false}

item.name: Remove a title from the player wishlist

request.description: Removes a title from the authenticated player's wishlist.

response.name: success
response.body: {"titleId":"{{titleId}}","included":false,"alreadyInRequestedState":false}

item.name: Developer
item.description: Authenticated developer routes for managing studios, titles, metadata, and releases.

request.description: Lists the studios managed by the authenticated developer.

response.name: success
response.body: {"studios":[{"id":"aaaa1111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111","slug":"blue-harbor-games","displayName":"Blue Harbor Games","description":"Independent Board studio building thoughtful co-op and family-friendly releases.","avatarUrl":"https://assets.example/studios/blue-harbor-games-avatar.png","logoUrl":"https://assets.example/studios/blue-harbor-games-logo.png","bannerUrl":"https://assets.example/studios/blue-harbor-games-banner.png","createdAt":"2026-03-08T00:00:00.000Z","updatedAt":"2026-03-08T00:00:00.000Z","links":[{"id":"bbbb2222-2222-2222-2222-222222222222","label":"Store","url":"https://store.example/blue-harbor-games","createdAt":"2026-03-08T00:00:00.000Z","updatedAt":"2026-03-08T00:00:00.000Z"}],"role":"owner"}]}

item.name: Create a studio for the current developer

request.description: Creates a studio owned by the authenticated developer.

{

  "displayName": "Blue Harbor Games",

  "bannerUrl": "https://assets.example/studios/blue-harbor-games-banner.png"
}

request.description: Deletes a managed studio.

item.name: List titles for a managed studio

request.description: Lists titles for a managed studio.

response.name: success
response.body: {"titles":[{"id":"11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111","studioId":"aaaa1111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111","studioSlug":"blue-harbor-games","slug":"lantern-drift","contentKind":"game","lifecycleStatus":"published","visibility":"listed","isReported":false,"currentMetadataRevision":3,"displayName":"Lantern Drift","shortDescription":"A lantern-lit co-op puzzle game.","genreDisplay":"Cooperative Puzzle","minPlayers":1,"maxPlayers":4,"playerCountDisplay":"1-4 players","ageRatingAuthority":"ESRB","ageRatingValue":"E10+","minAgeYears":10,"ageDisplay":"ESRB E10+","cardImageUrl":"https://assets.example/catalog/lantern-drift-card.png","acquisitionUrl":"https://store.example/lantern-drift"}]}

item.name: Create a title for a managed studio

request.description: Creates a title for a managed studio.

body.raw:
{
  "slug": "lantern-drift",
  "contentKind": "game",
  "lifecycleStatus": "published",
  "visibility": "listed",
  "metadata": {
    "displayName": "Lantern Drift",
    "shortDescription": "A lantern-lit co-op puzzle game.",
    "description": "Work together to route light and solve shifting puzzle rooms.",
    "genreSlugs": [
      "cooperative-puzzle"
    ],
    "minPlayers": 1,
    "maxPlayers": 4,
    "ageRatingAuthority": "ESRB",
    "ageRatingValue": "E10+",
    "minAgeYears": 10
  }
}

response.name: success

body.raw:
{
  "slug": "lantern-drift",

  "minPlayers": 1,
